products.name: Golden Hour Tote

products.description: Blush quilted clutch with chain strap detail and a soft luxury-inspired finish.

products.description: Structured ivory shoulder bag with gold chain strap and classic styling.

products.name: Emerald City Satchel
products.description: Dark green structured satchel with dual handles and professional design.
